name: Delete eco news by id with invalid or restricted access -- @1.1
fullName: Delete Eco News: Delete eco news by id with invalid or restricted access

steps.name: Given I am an authorized user
When I send request to delete eco news with id "1"
Then the response status code should be 404
And the response message get/delete request should be "Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 1"

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 1

parameterValues: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 1
